name: GOLFTEC East Hanover
about: GOLFTEC East Hanover is a golf training and club fitting center focused on data-driven improvement. The venue utilizes advanced technology including high-speed video analysis, launch monitors, and OPTIMOTION motion-capture systems to provide personalized coaching and club fitting services. Students can access training bays equipped with simulator technology for practice sessions, with the process guided by coach-designed training plans to ensure structured progress. The center offers a seamless booking experience for lessons, fittings, and practice time.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced launch monitors and high-speed video analysis
Personalized coaching that creates actionable improvement plans
Practice memberships providing access to training bays with technology for self-directed sessions

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service is mentioned.
No on-site alcohol service is mentioned.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs for lessons and practice. If you are looking for new clubs, GOLFTEC offers a custom club fitting service and sells golf clubs from top brands.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No information is provided regarding outside food or drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: No specific information is provided about the time required to play 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers services that are suitable for juniors and youth, including lessons using advanced technology that can help young players understand their swing.
